# PERF-230 negative: pure helper hoisted; stdlib Parse* / pool.Get must not fire
lang: go
file: PERF-230-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"strconv"
	"sync"
	"time"
)

func parseProps(props string) int {
	return len(props)
}

func EstimateTextWidth(font string, text string, size float64) float64 {
	return float64(len(text)) * size * 0.5
}

func GetTextWidth(font string, text string) float64 {
	return float64(len(text))
}

var bufPool = sync.Pool{New: func() any { return new([]byte) }}

func DrawCells(cells []string, props string, font string, size float64) float64 {
	// Hoisted pure helpers — not re-evaluated per cell.
	w := parseProps(props)
	base := EstimateTextWidth(font, "", size)
	_ = GetTextWidth(font, "")
	total := float64(w) + base
	for _, cell := range cells {
		total += float64(len(cell))
		// Must NOT trip PERF-230: stdlib parse and pool accessors.
		_, _ = time.Parse(time.RFC3339, cell)
		_, _ = strconv.ParseInt(cell, 10, 64)
		_, _ = strconv.Atoi(cell)
		b := bufPool.Get().(*[]byte)
		bufPool.Put(b)
	}
	return total
}
